svg.text: (set down by the count of leagues: 150 leagues north of Menegroth)
two thousand miles from the coast of Beleriand
473 — the Havens of the Falas destroyed
473 — the Havens of the Falas destroyed
(the coasts of the Elder Days are here unrecorded)
(Aman and the Isle are drawn by report only, without scale)
In this sea lay Numenor the Downfallen;
from Beleriand of the Elder Days to the lands of the Third Age
Herein the loremasters of Imladris have set down the West of Middle-earth
as it stands at the end of the Third Age; and, beneath the waves, Beleriand
of the Elder Days — for the Sea covers it, but the Eldar do not forget.
Aman and the Lonely Isle are set down by the report of the mariners;
dashed coasts are unrecorded, and nothing herein is invented.
Latitudes after the reckoning of the Dúnedain · one league = three miles
